overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates towering skyscrapers, descends to a waterfront canal, passes through a traditional Japanese-style covered bridge, and returns to bustling streets with food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts down from skyward view to street level as movement begins
crossing the street alongside moving vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a busy intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with green and red facade covered in digital signage
cylindrical tower wrapped in red neon rings
floating digital advertisements and brand logos
elevated transit line structure crossing above the street
ground floor commercial storefronts with awnings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of futuristic skyscrapers before tilting down to street level. The player walks through a busy urban intersection surrounded by the mega building complex and spiral neon tower. Holographic billboards float above as the player crosses the asphalt among moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp with red structural arches leading to waterfront

events.description: turning right onto a descending ramp toward the water
pedestrian passes directly in front of camera, briefly blocking view with back of head
reaching the water level and waterfront platform

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down a ramp toward the canal, passing under red structural arches

entered.detail: large curved red structural supports framing the ramp
body of water reflecting the surrounding buildings
concrete viewing area at water level

segments.scene_description: The player turns right onto a descending ramp characterized by distinctive red structural arches. The mega building complex recedes behind as the spiral neon tower shifts to the left side of the frame. At approximately 16 seconds, a pedestrian briefly occludes the view. The segment ends as the player reaches the waterfront platform overlooking the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront viewing platform with backlit city skyline

events.description: panning to view the water surface and distant skyline with sun glare
turning to walk back toward the promenade

agents.ego_description: standing at the waterfront observing the canal and distant architecture, then turning to continue

entered.detail: cluster of tall buildings visible across the water
Japanese-style roof structure visible in the distance along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: At the water's edge, the player pauses to observe the canal with the sun creating a backlit glow on the distant skyline. The spiral neon tower now appears on the right. The traditional covered bridge becomes visible in the distance to the left. The player then turns to begin walking along the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian promenade with traditional architecture

events.description: entering the waterfront promenade area with traditional Japanese architectural elements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the traditional covered bridge, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: red paved pedestrian walkway with railings along the water
street vendor stalls with umbrellas along the right side

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the red-tiled waterfront promenade, with the water canal visible to the right behind railings. The traditional covered bridge grows larger as the player approaches. Food carts line the right side of the path, and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead. The spiral neon tower remains visible to the left among the dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional Japanese roof and purple neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered walkway, lighting shifts to purple neon artificial light

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered bridge with traditional wooden architecture and purple overhead lighting

entered.detail: enclosed corridor with traditional wooden beam construction
overhead purple fluorescent light fixtures lining the ceiling
seating along the sides of the walkway
illuminated advertisement panels on the walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters the traditional covered bridge, transitioning from bright daylight to the sheltered interior illuminated by purple neon lights. The wooden architectural details and benches line the sides, while digital posters display advertisements. The structure blocks the view of the sky and surrounding towers, creating an intimate corridor atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with food vendors and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back to open street with bright sunlight
walking alongside moving traffic on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered bridge and continuing along the busy street, passing food vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at cart under red umbrella

entered.detail: broad pedestrian walkway with vehicle traffic to the left
cars driving along the street adjacent to the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the player returns to the bright open street. The traditional covered bridge recedes to the left rear as the player walks along a bustling promenade with food vendors on the right and moving traffic on the left. The spiral neon tower becomes visible again in the distance as the player continues through the vibrant urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the towering heights of a neon metropolis down to a serene waterfront and through a traditional architectural corridor. It begins with a dramatic tilt from the skyscrapers down to a busy urban intersection filled with holographic billboards and moderate traffic. As the camera turns right, it descends a ramp framed by red structural arches, leaving the mega buildings behind to reach a backlit waterfront platform overlooking a canal. The scene then shifts along a red-tiled promenade lined with food carts and railings, moving toward a traditional covered bridge that transitions the lighting from bright daylight to a sheltered interior of purple neon and wooden beams. Finally, the camera emerges from the intimate corridor back into the vibrant open street, where the spiral neon tower reappears in the distance amidst a bustling promenade of vendors and traffic.
